key.name: check-system
key.description: Whether to check for system package updates via the detected package manager (dnf, apt, or zypper).

key.name: check-flatpak
key.description: Whether to check for Flatpak application updates.

key.name: check-interval-hours
key.description: How often to poll for updates, in hours.

key.name: check-cve
key.description: Whether to check for known vulnerabilities in installed system packages using OSV API.

key.name: debug-mode
key.description: Write detailed extension logs to the system journal (viewable via journalctl).

key.name: monitored-git-paths
key.description: Comma-separated list of directories to scan for Git repositories to check for vulnerabilities.

key.name: check-npm
key.description: Whether to check for vulnerabilities in Node.js packages using OSV API.

key.name: monitored-npm-paths
key.description: Comma-separated list of directories to scan for package.json files.

key.name: npm-auto-discover
key.description: Automatically search your home directory for Node.js projects.

key.name: last-check-timestamp
key.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the last successful check.

key.name: cached-distro-timestamp
key.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the last distro detection.
